description: Format the open document 'Contract_Renewal_Letter.docx' for a #10 window envelope. Place the recipient address block starting with 'Ms. Sarah Jenkins' into a text box positioned at an absolute position of 1.0 inch to the right of the page and 2.0 inches below the page. The text box must have no border. Save the document as 'Contract_Renewal_Letter_Fixed.docx' in the Documents folder.
